executionHistory.summary: Diagnostic/routing packet: no packet-unique code line. The confirmed first defect (design.md Root Cause — parent-runner interruption: the Docker-daemon-owned Go E2E runner container had no per-run label, so e2e_stop_child could not reap it and it kept executing tests while the parent cleanup trap tore down Compose, the exact 'services not healthy after 2m0s' signature) is fixed by the shared commit 8c4a10bf (git merge-base --is-ancestor 8c4a10bf HEAD = YES-ANCESTOR on main). Its load-bearing production-CLI change is the smackerel.sh runner reaping (E2E_CHILD_RUN_LABEL + e2e_terminate_docker_children, present at HEAD lines 1489/1733 — a targeted label-based reap, not a blind timeout or sleep). Product ownership of the reaping is BUG-031-009; BUG-038-003's declared change boundary explicitly permits consuming/verifying the owning BUG-031-009 harness files. No excluded surface touched (git status clean after byte-exact restore of the revert-reverify edits).

Current-session genuine neighbor-safety revert-reverify on the real disposable stack (good-neighbor: block-wait on the shared test-suite lock, never evict a foreign stack; own stack torn down clean). RED — reverting only the collision-resistant per-run searchTerm to 'Tomato salad' forces TestDriveCrossFeatureE2E_ProviderNeutralConsumersAndProducers to FAIL (/api/search must return BOTH provider rows; google=false mem=false, --- FAIL 2.09s), yet TestDriveObservabilityE2E (successor) and every other Drive scenario stay GREEN on the same stack; NEIGHBOR_RED_EXIT=1 (BR-038-003-002 serialized neighbor safety). GREEN — git checkout HEAD -- restores the term byte-exact and the full Drive package is GREEN (ok tests/e2e/drive 4.319s, PASS: go-e2e, NEIGHBOR_GREEN_EXIT=0). Focused Drive integration PASS (TestMultiProviderDriveSearchUsesUnifiedRankingAndAudienceFilters, INTEG_EXIT=0); full Go+Python unit suites PASS ([go-unit] OK, [py-unit] 708 passed, UNIT_EXIT=0). Evidence: report.md 'Current-Session Neighbor-Safety Revert-Reverify' + 'Current-Session Broader Verification'.

Broader Drive E2E regression: ./smackerel.sh test e2e --go-run '^TestDrive' -> entire serialized Drive package GREEN, ok tests/e2e/drive 4.319s, PASS: go-e2e, NEIGHBOR_GREEN_EXIT=0. Includes SCN-001 (TestDriveObservabilityE2E_MetricsAndCountersReconcileAfterStressFixture — live metric families + per-provider counter deltas + persisted rows reconcile, core healthy after cleanup) and cascade-noise recovery (TestDrivePolicyE2E_*, TestDriveRetrieveE2E_*, TestDriveSaveE2E_*, TestDriveScanE2E_* all PASS on the same disposable stack, resolving BR-038-003-004). No product regression; no findings to route. The ambient 'Skipping Ollama agent E2E' harness line is dispositioned DI-038-003-03 (G095).
